subjects.description: Sika deer with white spots drinking beside a tranquil forest stream.
subjects.appearance_details: Slender brown coat with distinctive white spots, fine legs, alert ears, smooth neck, dark moist nose near the water surface.
subjects.relationship: Single deer subject peacefully interacting with the stream in a quiet woodland setting.
subjects.location: Near bank of the stream, foreground slightly left of center with water flowing across the lower frame.
subjects.relative_size: Medium sized animal, prominent in the foreground while trees and greenery frame it.
subjects.orientation: Side profile angled toward camera right, head lowered toward the water.
subjects.pose: Standing still with front legs near the stream edge and neck extended downward.
subjects.action: Lowers its head and drinks from the clear moving stream.
subjects.state_changes: Starts alert with head partly lowered, touches nose to water and drinks, ends lifting slightly as ripples spread.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Short smooth brown fur with pale spots and soft natural sheen.
subjects.facial_features: Dark eyes, narrow muzzle, black nose, tall pointed ears.

background_setting: Quiet stream in a lush green forest, surrounded by tall trees, mossy stones, grasses, and leafy plants casting dappled shadows on the water.

context: A spotted sika deer pauses at a woodland stream to drink in a serene natural habitat.

actions.description: The deer stands at the stream bank, ears flicking as it lowers its head toward the clear water.
Its nose touches the surface and it drinks quietly while small ripples spread around its muzzle.
The deer lifts its head slightly, droplets falling from its nose as leaves rustle behind it.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a sika deer approaches the stream edge. 0:02-0:05 it drinks from the clear forest water. 0:05-0:07 it lifts slightly as ripples drift downstream.
audio_description: Gentle flowing water, soft leaf rustle, faint bird calls, tiny lapping sounds from the deer drinking.
